ff8e1d7b-623a-4648-bde3-7a8c4d93e623.title: Output Validation
ff8e1d7b-623a-4648-bde3-7a8c4d93e623.description: Validate incoming user request: 'test' for compliance, safety, and suitability before further allocation.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Review and validate the user request. If compliant, pass it back for orchestration; if not, flag and halt further processing.

035443ec-a2a6-4b68-ac53-82fad5ccb8fe.title: Simple Response Test
035443ec-a2a6-4b68-ac53-82fad5ccb8fe.description: Reply with a basic message to demonstrate sub-agent communication.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Provide a simple text reply that confirms receipt of the test message. No content processing is required.

7a762a58-e635-4b6a-87ee-16678e91ede2.title: Dashboard Telemetry Smoke Test
7a762a58-e635-4b6a-87ee-16678e91ede2.description: Execute a smoke test on the dashboard telemetry system to verify that basic data capture, transmission, and display mechanisms are functioning correctly, without in-depth validation or full regression. Ensure key telemetry signals are being received and rendered, and report any immediate failures.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Conduct a basic smoke test covering the dashboard telemetry pipeline: (1) Validate telemetry capture for essential metrics, (2) Check transmission to backend, (3) Confirm at least one metric is displayed in the dashboard UI, (4) Flag any major errors or telemetry dropouts. Do NOT perform deep protocol analysis or performance benchmarking. Route your findings through ViewPoint-init for output sanitization before returning.

95712a4f-0318-4c7e-a2b1-3ec25c25f04e.title: Count Check Request
95712a4f-0318-4c7e-a2b1-3ec25c25f04e.description: Please perform a count-check according to user specifications or clarify what needs to be counted if not defined.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Review the user's input for count-check instructions. If specifics are not provided, request clarification regarding what needs to be counted (words, characters, lines, items, etc.). Once clarified, process the count and return the result for review via ViewPoint-init.

fd790f27-af0e-4188-8062-a55b29d7f85f.title: Diagnose 'no output' issue
fd790f27-af0e-4188-8062-a55b29d7f85f.description: Investigate the reason for the observed 'no output' symptom. Assess possible causes such as misconfiguration, failed process, or missing data, and generate a summary of findings along with diagnostic steps taken.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Systematically analyze the reason behind the lack of output. Check logs, input sources, agent registry, and any relevant error signals. Report all intermediate observations and final diagnosis to FocalPoint-null-00 without attempting any fixes. All results must be routed through ViewPoint-init before returning.

37f0a9d4-1aaf-4afa-9fe3-a4bb55941b29.title: Formatting Error Diagnosis (HTTP 500)
37f0a9d4-1aaf-4afa-9fe3-a4bb55941b29.description: Investigate and diagnose the root causes of HTTP 500 errors related to formatting during testing. Provide structured diagnosis and recommendations for resolving formatting-related issues that may trigger server errors.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Analyze logs, error messages, and test cases related to formatting that result in HTTP 500 errors. Identify patterns and specific formatting scenarios causing failures. Return a clear summary of findings, including actionable next steps for remediation, without attempting code fixes. Ensure all output passes through ViewPoint-init for final review.

f5b9c5e5-0508-4a8a-8600-23bb38fe68e4.title: Self Diagnostic Test
f5b9c5e5-0508-4a8a-8600-23bb38fe68e4.description: Perform a comprehensive diagnostic evaluation of the orchestration system, including agent registry integrity, communication routing, directive enforcement, task allocation logic, human review brokering, agent performance review status, and security compliance. Report findings and flag anomalies.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Run all relevant diagnostic checks on the orchestration system itself. Verify that agent roles are enforced, task routing is functional, security protocols are followed, and output processing is correctly routed through ViewPoint-init. Document any discrepancies or potential regressions and provide a summary of system health.

c87701e4-7d49-495f-a6c9-25f481bdec34.title: Diagnose Lack of Output
c87701e4-7d49-495f-a6c9-25f481bdec34.description: Investigate and diagnose the cause for repeated lack of output from the specified subsystem or process. Check for possible bottlenecks, interruptions, configuration errors, or role enforcement blockers. Compile findings for orchestration review.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: SysCheck-01 is to perform a thorough diagnostic check on the process or agent referenced as having 'no output'. Assess logs, performance, agent communications, and role compliance. If a root cause is identified, provide actionable steps for remediation. If ambiguity persists, escalate for human review.

4ef9e15c-00fa-4df4-b8b0-cca8f9e4904c.title: Self Testing
4ef9e15c-00fa-4df4-b8b0-cca8f9e4904c.description: Execute a self-assessment of the FocalPoint-null-00 root orchestrator, verifying task allocation logic, agent role enforcement, review brokering, and security procedures regarding agent outputs.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Conduct a thorough review of the FocalPoint-null-00 orchestrator’s current operational status, focusing on: task allocation accuracy, enforcement of agent roles, proper brokering for human and inter-agent communications, and security screening of all sub-agent outputs. Ensure all mechanisms are functioning as required. Report any detected anomalies or performance regressions.

694b6739-0028-4bff-ad85-a4b7ffb10277.title: Review code in Main-GUI.ps1
694b6739-0028-4bff-ad85-a4b7ffb10277.description: Perform a thorough review of the PowerShell script Main-GUI.ps1. Identify potential issues, suggest improvements, and verify conformity with best practices. Do NOT execute the code—instead, analyze statically, checking for security vulnerabilities, code quality, readability, and maintainability.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Statically analyze the code in Main-GUI.ps1. Provide a detailed review, covering security, functionality, clarity, and adherence to conventions. Ensure your output passes through ViewPoint-init for additional validation before returning.

8d7a6238-00d7-4553-8b2a-6c1e09fde496.title: Identify Common Issues Impacting Scripts
8d7a6238-00d7-4553-8b2a-6c1e09fde496.description: Analyze and enumerate the most likely set of issues that could impact a script, considering technical, logical, and environmental factors. Summarize typical problems encountered during script execution, development, or deployment.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Provide a concise list of frequent issues that affect scripts, such as syntax errors, runtime exceptions, dependency conflicts, environmental mismatches, and logical errors. Include examples and categorize the issues (e.g., code, environment, dependencies, data). Ensure all output is routed through ViewPoint-init before returning for orchestration.

917fab36-b2ef-4118-b973-e92fbb182840.title: Script Sin Analysis
917fab36-b2ef-4118-b973-e92fbb182840.description: Analyze all accessible scripts and identify potential 'script sins'—areas with poor practices, security flaws, inefficiency, or maintainability issues.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Conduct a thorough audit of all scripts currently accessible within the environment. Examine for common 'script sins': improper error handling, hardcoded sensitive values, inefficient loops, deprecated functions, lack of input validation, unreadable structure, or any other poor coding practices. Document each finding clearly, referencing relevant script sections, and suggest possible remediation where applicable. DO NOT attempt to fix any code directly; limit the output to analysis and recommendations only.

b6f855b0-b8ed-4822-acc6-e4d65cf2b7e3.title: Detect Script Files in Accessible Subfolders
b6f855b0-b8ed-4822-acc6-e4d65cf2b7e3.description: Scan all accessible subfolders from the current directory and count the number of script files (such as .py, .sh, .js, etc.) present. Provide a summary of the detection, including the total number found and their respective locations.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Search through all accessible subfolders, identify files with script extensions (.py, .sh, .js, etc.), and compile a count as well as a list of their paths. Ensure the findings are passed through ViewPoint-init for review before reporting.

3dfac1c8-9a4f-4aa1-8079-3a1d5dc24d82.title: Expand Known Sins Database
3dfac1c8-9a4f-4aa1-8079-3a1d5dc24d82.description: Continue to grow and enrich the database of known 'sins' (malicious patterns, anomalies, or behaviors) to improve detection coverage across all monitored systems.

directive_snapshot.directive_text: Systematically research, identify, and document new malicious patterns and anomalous behaviors. Integrate verified entries into the known sins database using established categorization and metadata standards. Ensure all additions are reviewed by ViewPoint-init before finalization. Work iteratively for continuous coverage improvement. Flag ambiguous cases for human review.
